title: lamium moluccella
intro: Lamium moluccella, also known as Vervain or Sweet Vervain, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, insomnia, and stress, due to its calming and sedative effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving headaches, and easing menstrual cramps, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Lamium moluccella is often used as a tea, tincture, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
